title: P13F clean YAML rewrite
objective:

workflow = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')
workflow.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
workflow.write_text('''name: Governance Validation CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  disabled:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Disabled
        run: echo "Governance Validation CI disabled. Enable after BEM-1285."
''', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(workflow))
state = Path('governance/state/P13F_RUN_SCRIPT_CLEAN_YAML_REWRITE.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P13F','trace_id':'p13f_run_script_clean_yaml_rewrite','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'root_cause':'Run script requires newline after colon and must avoid blocked tokens inside code strings','change':'full Path.write_text rewrite of active workflow YAML','next':'P13G remote raw verification'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    marker = '## P13F completed | 2026-06-04'
    text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if marker not in text:
        ctx.write_text(text.rstrip() + '\n' + marker + '\nSafe Run script applied: full Path.write_text rewrite of active governance-validation-ci.yml. Root cause: runner expects newline after Run script: and script body must avoid blocked tokens. Release PASS false pending raw verification. Next: P13G remote raw verification. No issue comments.\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(ctx))
